name: Standard Issue
desc: Reliable steel toecaps. Owned by default.

name: Semtex Soles
desc: Every boot lands with a wee bang. Invaders go up like chip-pan fat.

name: Greased Brogues
desc: Slide halfway down the Falls on a single shove.

name: Hare's Hoofs
desc: Leg it like the peelers are after you. Faster than your last excuse.
